channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 6G : la bataille pour les fréquences commence dès maintenant
item.description: Nous ne devrions pas voir la 6G sur nos appareils avant 2030, mais il faut s'intéresser à la répartition des fréquences bien avant ça pour éviter les soucis.

item.title: How to Watch Artemis 2 Reach the Moon and Make Spaceflight History Today
item.description: The Artemis 2 crew will spend six hours observing the lunar far side today, seeing parts of the Moon no human has ever laid eyes on.

item.title: Trump threatens Iran with strikes on ‘Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day’ if Strait of Hormuz remains closed
item.description: Trump issued the threat on social media as a 45-day ceasefire proposal came from Egyptian, Pakistani and Turkish mediators. Iran and the United States received a draft proposal late Sunday calling for a 45-day ceasefire and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, two Mideast officials speaking condition of anonymity told The Associated Press.The proposal comes from Egyptian, Pakistani and Turkish mediators hoping the 45-day window would provide enough time for talks to reach a permanent ceasefire. Iran and the U.S. have not responded to the proposal, which was sent to Iranian Foreign Minister A...

item.title: Bad news Claude users — Anthropic says you'll need to pay to use OpenClaw now
item.description: Anthropic is removing third-party tools like OpenClaw from its subscription to balance demand and strain.

item.title: Convicted spyware maker Bryan Fleming avoids jail at sentencing
item.description: The pcTattletale founder escapes a custodial sentence following the first successful prosecution of a spyware maker in the U.S. for over a decade.

item.title: Elijah Wood May Have Revealed the New Aragorn for ‘Hunt for Gollum’
item.description: Plus, get more of the creepy vibes of 'The Backrooms' in a meta new ad.

item.title: Spain’s Xoople raises $130 million Series B to map the Earth for AI
item.description: The company is also announcing a deal with L3Harris to build the sensors for Xoople's spacecraft.

item.title: What is the release date for Daredevil: Born Again season 2 episode 4 on Disney+?
item.description: Here's when Marvel will release the fourth episode of Daredevil: Born Again season 2 on Disney+.

item.title: 'Has Trump assisted audience fascination with Gilead? Perhaps': The Testaments' creators on why the real world hasn't changed since The Handmaid's Tale
item.description: Trump's first and second terms have aligned with the release of both The Handmaid's Tale and The Testaments — but for the creators, nothing has changed.

item.title: How former Labor Secretary Robert Reich packages his anti-inequality message for Gen Z
item.description: Reich and Heather Kinlaw Lofthouse of Inequality Media reach millions of people with content about the imbalances of power in our democracy and economy. Robert Reich has been warning people about the dangers of inequality for decades, in all sorts of different ways. He’s interacted directly with politicians as a member of three different presidential administrations, most notably as Bill Clinton’s labor secretary. He’s taught thousands of college students at Harvard, Brandeis, and UC Berkeley. He’s written 18 books. And for 11 years, he has run Inequality Media, a nonprofit dedicated to infor...

item.title: Où et quand regarder le direct d’Artemis II qui survole la Lune ? YouTube, NASA+, Netflix, Prime Video et plus encore
item.description: Ce soir, la mission Artemis II passe au plus près de la surface lunaire. Entre les photos haute définition et les vidéos laser en 4K, la NASA a mis les petits plats dans les grands pour nous faire vivre l'événement. Voici les horaires précis pour la France métropolitaine.

item.title: Le numéro 1 mondial de la voiture électrique va déployer massivement ses bornes de charge ultra rapide
item.description: Officialisées en mars 2026, les bornes Flash Charging de BYD vont arriver en masse, d’abord en Chine,. Le géant de la voiture électrique prévoit en effet d’y installer pas moins de 20 000 bornes au cours de l’année 2026.

item.title: AI is coming for superbugs
item.description: The technology is uniquely suited to help discover new options. In all the worthy discussions around the promise and peril of AI, we may be overlooking one of its most powerful use cases: solving urgent global health crises. Few problems illustrate this better than antibiotic resistance.

item.title: The real work-life crisis isn’t early parenthood. It’s what comes next
item.description: The grueling triple whammy of the Caregiving Cliff. For years companies have been operating as though working parents with young children are the center of the work-life balance issue. Taking care of little kids is intense, to be sure. But the truth is the real work-life crisis isn’t at that point in their lives. It’s coming in five, ten, or fifteen years. This is the Caregiving Cliff, the time when the highest paid, most tenured, or most worthy of promotion start cracking under the pressure of taking care of kids, aging parents, and their own health needs....

item.title: Are stock markets and stores open on Easter Monday 2026? Hours today for banks, NYSE, Walmart, Costco, more
item.description: April 6 is not a federal holiday in the United States like it is in many other countries. The could mean both good and bad news for your stock portfolio. Today, April 6, 2026, is Easter Monday. It’s the final part of the long Easter Weekend, which runs from Good Friday through today.

item.title: Top museums hit by apparent cyberattack on Vivaticket — Louvre and other institutions affected
item.description: A hacking group called RansomHouse is claiming responsibility, saying it breached Vivaticket through a French subsidiary.

item.title: Cette selle inédite transforme votre vélo électrique en biplace : on l’a testé et on a adoré
item.description: Frandroid a testé la Selle Jallot le temps d’une balade parisienne avec son fondateur, avec à la clé une belle expérience autant en passager qu'en conducteur (de vélo électrique).

item.title: ‘The Super Mario Galaxy Movie’ Jumps to Big Opening Weekend
item.description: April has begun, and with it has come 'The Super Mario Galaxy Movie.' Will it conquer the theatrical month?

item.title: 8 Best Apple Watch Accessories (2026): Bands, Chargers, and More
item.description: You finally caved and bought an Apple Watch. These are our favorite bands, screen protectors, and chargers to go with your new smartwatch.

item.title: Design has been solving the wrong problem
item.description: Design has optimized for the moment of purchase, not the reality of use. For too long, design has been too focused on how things look. That makes sense when products are competing for attention. Form becomes a way to stand out, a signal of taste, a shortcut to desire. But it’s fleeting. A shopper may feel good at checkout, then realize later that the product doesn’t actually enhance her life. That’s a failure....

item.title: 3 AI tools that make keeping up with the news easier
item.description: Huxe, Google CC, and Yutori Scouts offer different ways to turn the flood of email, news, and niche interests into manageable updates. This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps.

item.title: I took Panasonic’s new 15x zoom travel compact camera on vacation, and it still has no rival — but flagship Chinese phones are getting close
item.description: The Lumix ZS300 / TZ300 travel compact is a refresh of the 8-year-old Lumix ZS200 / TZ200 — but is the versatile snapper still relevant in 2026?

item.title: 'Silicon photonics is central to next-generation AI infrastructure': How light-based chips could solve AI’s growing bottlenecks
item.description: A silicon photonics pioneer explains how light-based technology could reshape AI, computing, and data infrastructure.

item.title: NHS staff push back against using 'ethically bankrupt' Palantir software, say 'it doesn't do anything new for us'
item.description: Some NHS workers are refusing to use Palantir software over the company's ties to controversial activity.

item.title: Le nouveau MacBook Air M5 dans sa version 15 pouces profite déjà d’une belle ristourne sur Amazon
item.description: Le MacBook Air M5 vient de sortir et Amazon lui offre déjà une promotion puisque la version de 15 pouces passe de 1 499 euros à 1 399 euros.

item.title: Iran is threatening to bomb the $30 billion Stargate AI data center backed by OpenAI, Nvidia, and other tech giants
item.description: The Stargate UAE AI data center, proudly announced by OpenAI and the US government, could be hit by missile strikes.
